description: Simple self-custodial wallet for Bitcoin and Lightning.

name: Machankura
description: Bitcoin via USSD — no internet needed. Designed for Africa.

description: Simple tool to estimate transaction fees and priority levels.

name: CoinMarketCap
description: Popular crypto price and market cap tracker with portfolio tools.

name: Bisq

description: Private peer-to-peer Lightning exchange over Tor. No KYC.

name: Amboss

name: 1ML
